_comment: Monorepo-friendly setup. Templates live under apps/{name}/... or libs/{name}/..., several apps share basenames (`dialog.component.html` exists multiple times), and reusable UI components like <custom-dropdown> are placed in many parent contexts. componentNaming='disambiguate' makes the resulting testids globally unique by prefixing the colliding paths' uncommon segment; collisionStrategy='auto' resolves intra-template collisions with readable --1/--2 sibling-index suffixes; lockNames freezes Robot variables once written so tests don't need re-syncing on every refactor.
